# Panguard AI

> Panguard AI is an open-source, AI-powered endpoint security platform that
> protects servers with behavioral AI, 3,155 Sigma rules, and 5,895 YARA
> signatures — installable in 60 seconds via a single CLI command.

## Product

- [Product Overview](https://panguard.ai/product): Full product suite — five AI-powered security tools on one platform
- [Panguard Scan](https://panguard.ai/product/scan): Free 60-second AI security audit. No installation required
- [Panguard Guard](https://panguard.ai/product/guard): 24/7 real-time threat detection agent with behavioral AI
- [Panguard Chat](https://panguard.ai/product/chat): AI security copilot for plain-language threat investigation
- [Panguard Trap](https://panguard.ai/product/trap): Intelligent honeypots for attacker deception and intelligence
- [Panguard Report](https://panguard.ai/product/report): Automated compliance reports for ISO 27001, SOC 2, TCSA
- [Panguard Manager](https://panguard.ai/product/manager): Centralized multi-endpoint management dashboard
- [Panguard MCP](https://panguard.ai/product/mcp): Model Context Protocol server for AI-native security workflows
- [Skill Auditor](https://panguard.ai/product/skill-auditor): AI agent permission analysis and threat surface auditing

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://panguard.ai/pricing): Community (free), Solo ($9/mo), Pro ($29/mo), Business ($79/mo)
- [Compare](https://panguard.ai/compare): Panguard vs manual audit vs SIEM vs no protection

## Solutions

- [For Developers](https://panguard.ai/solutions/developers): Enterprise security with developer simplicity
- [For Small Business](https://panguard.ai/solutions/smb): Big company security on a small company budget
- [For Mid-size Companies](https://panguard.ai/solutions/enterprise): Scale security without scaling complexity

## Technology

- [How It Works](https://panguard.ai/how-it-works): Five detection stages, three tiers of AI
- [Technology](https://panguard.ai/technology): Detection engine architecture and AI models
- [Threat Cloud](https://panguard.ai/threat-cloud): Collective threat intelligence network
- [Integrations](https://panguard.ai/integrations): Slack, Teams, PagerDuty, Splunk, and more

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://panguard.ai/docs/getting-started): Install Panguard in 60 seconds
- [CLI Reference](https://panguard.ai/docs/cli): Command-line interface usage and flags
- [API Reference](https://panguard.ai/docs/api): REST API and webhook documentation
- [Scan Docs](https://panguard.ai/docs/scan): Scanner modules, scan types, and result interpretation
- [Guard Docs](https://panguard.ai/docs/guard): 5-agent pipeline, detection engines, and AI funnel
- [Chat Docs](https://panguard.ai/docs/chat): Notification channels and alert configuration
- [Trap Docs](https://panguard.ai/docs/trap): Honeypot types and threat intelligence
- [Report Docs](https://panguard.ai/docs/report): Compliance frameworks and PDF export
- [Skill Auditor Docs](https://panguard.ai/docs/skill-auditor): AI agent permission analysis
- [Benchmark](https://panguard.ai/docs/benchmark): Performance benchmarks and detection rates
- [Deployment Guide](https://panguard.ai/docs/deployment): Multi-endpoint production deployment
- [Advanced Setup](https://panguard.ai/docs/advanced-setup): Ollama, Falco, Suricata integration

## Agent Threat Rules (ATR)

- [ATR on GitHub](https://github.com/panguard/atr): Open-source threat detection rules for AI agents
- ATR is a YAML-based rule format — like Sigma rules, but purpose-built for AI agent behaviors
- 22 production rules (+ 5 draft) covering 7 attack categories: prompt injection, data exfiltration, privilege escalation, resource abuse, unauthorized access, supply chain attacks, and evasion techniques

## Compliance

- [Compliance](https://panguard.ai/compliance): Taiwan TCSA, ISO 27001, SOC 2 automation
- [Security](https://panguard.ai/security): Our own security practices and responsible disclosure
- [Trust Center](https://panguard.ai/trust): Security certifications and audit reports

- [Open Source](https://panguard.ai/open-source): MIT-licensed core components
- [Blog](https://panguard.ai/blog): Engineering, threat intelligence, and product updates
- [Customers](https://panguard.ai/customers): Case studies and use case scenarios
